notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jazz Chisholm Jr. singles on a line drive to center fielder Henry Bolte. Cody Bellinger to 3rd. Cody Bellinger advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by center fielder Henry Bolte.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Jazz Chisholm Jr. steals (14) 2nd base. Cody Bellinger scores. Jazz Chisholm Jr. to 3rd. Missed catch error by second baseman Alika Williams.

notableEvents.label: Aaron Judge GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Aaron Judge grounds into a double play, third baseman Zack Gelof to second baseman Alika Williams to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Ben Rice out at 2nd. Aaron Judge out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Jazz Chisholm Jr. steals (14) 2nd base. Cody Bellinger scores. Jazz Chisholm Jr. to 3rd. Missed catch error by second baseman Alika Williams.
